title: MUKLEI 1000 PCS 35mm Insulation Metal Washers, Easy Fix Washers for Insulation Boards, Tile Backer Boards
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL - The 35mm insulation washers are made of high-quality metal material, strong and not easy to deform, more durable, and long-lasting. They have good wear resistance and durability to meet your long-term use.

EASY TO INSTALL - Use the right size screws to fix these fixing washers. After installation, these fixing washers with 6 jaws can be tightly fixed on the surface to be installed. The perforated design allows adhesive or plaster to adhere to the surface of the board, minimising surface damage.

WIDELY APPLICABLE - These insulation fixings washers are suitable for tile matting, insulation boards, plasterboards, extruded boards, composite boards, and fixing building boards to frames, with a wide range of applications.

GREAT VALUE KIT - Our tile backer board washers have a diameter of 35mm, the package contains a total of 1000pcs of this size of fixing washers, which is plenty, enough for large projects, no need to buy over and over again, save time and effort, very good value for money!
SINCERE THOUGHTS - Welcome to shop at our shop. We do our best to make our customers enjoy a satisfying shopping experience. We hope that these insulation fixings are to your satisfaction
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Hardware > Nails, Screws & Fasteners > Washers
